titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 230: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 230. (A.R. No. 577 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRGUḌI, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall, central shrine in the Anantēśvara temple. King: Rājakēsarivarman (Rājarāja I)

This inscription opens by stating that a letter (śrīmukham) was sent by the emperor to the peruṅguṟi-pperumakkaḷ (members) of Śrī Vīranārayaṇachchaturvēdimaṅgalam (situated) on the northern bank (of the river Kāvēri). According to that Sōman, his younger brothers, Ravidāsan alias Pañchavan brahmādhirājaṉ and his younger brother Paramēśvaraṉ alias Irumuḍich-chōḷa brahmādhirājan, had been found guilty of treason as they murdered Karikāla chōḷa, who took the head of Pāṇḍya. As per the order, the properties (of the above two persons) their brother Malaiyaṉūrāṉ, of their younger brothers and sons, of their wives and other kith and kin were to be taken over by Brahmaśrīrājan of Kōṭṭaiyūr and Chandrasēkharabhaṭṭan of Puḷḷamaṅgalam.

The inscription records further that the sabhā were to arrange in co-operation with these two persons for the sale at current prices of all these lands and to remit the proceeds to the treasury in accordance with the royal order. The order concludes with the statement that it was written by Kurukkāḍi-Kīḻāṉ.

Accordingly two and odd vēli of land (as per the old measurement) and six residential houses owned by Ravidāśa (the second traitor), his mother and his sons were seized by the sabhā. These were purchased for 112 kaḻañju of gold from the sabhā by Bharatan alias Vyāḷagajamallaṉ, the son of Nakkaṉ Aravaṇaiyāṉ of Veṇṇaiyūr. He inturn endowed the same to the Tiruvanantēśvara-bhaṭṭārakar temple at the above village in order to defray ten nāḻi of paddy daily and also a kāśu per annum to a brāhmaṇa for supplying drinking water in the maṇḍapa, before the temple, called Mūvāyirattu-aru-nūṟṟuvaṉ and also for the daily feeding of sixteen brāhmaṇas, including five Śivayōgins, at the temple.
Published in Ep. Ind., Vol. XXI pp. 168-170.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . korājakesarivarmmarkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrī viranārāyaṇa ccaturvvedimaṅgalattup peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷukku cakravatti śrī mukham pāṇṭiyaṉait talaikoṇṭa karikāla coḻaṉaik koṉṟa drohikaḷāṉa somaṉai ṟampi
ravidāsaṉāṉa pañcavanbrahmādhirājaṉum Ivaṉ ṟampi parameśvaraṉāṉa Irumuṭiccoḻa brahmādhirājaṉum Ivakaḷuṭap piṟanta malaiyaṉūrāṉum Ivakaḷ tampimāru mivakaḷ makkaḷitum Ivar brāhmaṇimār perālu mi ṟam ttam
perappaṉmāritu mivakaḷ makkaḷitu mivakaḷukkup piḷḷai kuṭutta māmaṉ māritum tāyoṭuṭap piṟanta (māmaṉ) māmaṉmāritu mivakaḷuṭap piṟanta peṇkaḷai veṭṭāriṉavu mivakaḷ makkaḷai veṭṭāriṉavumāka Ivvaṉaivar muṟiyum nammāṇaikkuriyavāṟu ko
ṭṭaiyūr brahmaśrīrājaṉum puḷḷamaṅkalattu candraśekharabhaṭṭaṉaiyum perttantom tāṅkaḷu mivakaḷ kaṇkāṇiyoṭu mivakaḷ coṉṉavāṟu nammāṇaikkuriyavāṟu kuṭiyoṭu kuṭipeṟum vilaikku viṟṟut tālattiṭṭuka Ivai kurukāṭi kiḻāṉeḻutteṉṟu Ipparicu vara I
śrī mukhattiṉ meṟppaṭṭa malaiyaṉūrāṉāṉa pāppaṉacceri revadāsakramavittaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉu mivaṉṟāy periyanaṅkaic cāṉiyumim muvaritumāṉa nilam śrī viranārāyaṇaccaturvvedimaṅgalattu miypaṭākai tevaṉmaṅkalamāṉa paṭṭila nilam śrī viranārāyaṇaccaturvvedi
maṅgalattu sabhaiyār pakkal veṇṇaiyūr nāṭṭu veṇṇaiyūruṭaiyāṉ nakkaṉaravaṇaiyāṉāṉa pallava muttaraiyaṉ makaṉ parataṉāṉa vyāḷagajamallappallavaraiyaṉeṉin nilam paḻampaṭi Iraṇṭe mukkāleyorumāvu makamaṉaiyāṟumāka Innilamu mim maṉaiyum nūṟṟorupatti
ru kaḻañcu poṉ kuṭuttu vilai koṇṭivvūr tiruvanan=teśvarattu bhaṭṭārakar koyilile yivvāṭṭai meṣanāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai peṟṟa pūraṭṭāti ñāṉṟu candrādityavat Āḷvār koyil muṉpu muvāyirattaṟu nūṟṟuvaṉāṉa nilaiyampalattu taṇṇiraṭṭum brāhmaṇaṉoruvaṉukku nica
tam patiṉāḻi nellu māṭṭai vaṭṭamoru kācum nicatam patiṉaiyvar brāhmaṇaruṇpataṟkumāka patiṉāṟu Ivaṟṟu ḷeyyevar śivayogikaḷuṇṇavum vaiytteṉ Araiyaṉ bharataṉāṉa vyāḷagajamallap pallavaraiyaṉeṉ Idharmmam rakṣikkiṉṟa mahāsabhaiyār śrī pātaṅkaḷeṉ talaimeliṉa .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
